label: 房屋模板
description: 只画房顶掩码，程序自动生成立面、窗，门由掩码控制，渲染成房屋灰度图。输入一个只表达房顶的二维数组字符串 [[1,1,0],[1,1,1],...]（1=房顶，0=空，2=在该列开门）；按「高度」向上投影出立面；门不再随机生成，而是把某列底部的 1 改成 2，即在该列的立面墙脚开一扇固定 1 格高的门（相邻列的 2 连成更宽的门）；立面再按网格自动排布窗户。顶面按「屋顶类型」着色（pitched 坡屋顶 / flat 平屋顶），并沿建筑外缘与门窗框描深色细线，使灰度图更像房屋、更易被大模型识别。输出灰度图（同时归档到顶层 .forgeax/grayscale/）。
description-en: Draw only the roof mask; the program auto-generates facades and windows, with doors controlled by the mask, then renders a house grayscale map. Input is a roof-only 2D array string [[1,1,0],[1,1,1],...] (1=roof, 0=empty, 2=open a door in that column); facades are projected upward by 'height'; doors are no longer random — replacing a 1 at the bottom of a column with 2 opens a fixed 1-cell-high door at that column's wall front (adjacent 2s merge into a wider door); windows are then auto-gridded onto facades. The top face is shaded by 'roofType' (pitched / flat) and a dark outline is drawn along the silhouette and door/window frames, making the grayscale read more like a house for better model recognition. Output grayscale image(s); also archived under the top-level .forgeax/grayscale/.
icon: 一张深色画布上叠着一栋简化房屋的灰度立面剪影，顶面深灰、立面浅灰、底部一个门洞，左侧一个 JSON 花括号图标用箭头指向房屋，扁平插画风格，主色青绿与深灰两种，小尺寸可辨。

inputs.name: spec
inputs.label: 房顶掩码
inputs.description: 只表达房顶的二维数组字符串，形如 [[1,1,0],[1,1,1],[1,1,1]]（1=房顶，0=空，2=在该列开门）。立面由程序自动生成；门由掩码的 2 标记控制——把某列底部的 1 改成 2，即在该列立面墙脚开一扇 1 格高的门。也兼容三维数组 [[[...]],[[...]]] 批量产出多栋。
inputs.description-en: Roof-only 2D array string, e.g. [[1,1,0],[1,1,1],[1,1,1]] (1=roof, 0=empty, 2=open a door in that column). Facades are auto-generated; doors are controlled by the mask's 2 markers — replacing a 1 at a column's bottom with 2 opens a 1-cell-high door at that column's wall front. A 3D array [[[...]],[[...]]] is also accepted to emit multiple houses.

inputs.name: height
inputs.label: 高度
inputs.description: 房屋高度（立面向上投影的行数）。越大立面越高。
inputs.description-en: House height (number of rows the facade is projected upward). Larger = taller facade.

inputs.name: roofType
inputs.label: 屋顶类型
inputs.description: 屋顶着色方式：pitched=坡屋顶（屋脊高光向两侧屋檐渐暗，读作两面坡）；flat=平屋顶（顶面纯色平涂）。
inputs.description-en: Roof shading: pitched = gabled roof (bright ridge fading to darker eaves, reads as two slopes); flat = flat roof (solid-color top).

outputs.name: image
outputs.label: 灰度图
outputs.description: 渲染出的房屋灰度图引用（资产库 alias），每个 entry 一张；同时归档到顶层 .forgeax/grayscale/。
outputs.description-en: Rendered house grayscale image refs (asset-library alias), one per entry; also archived under the top-level .forgeax/grayscale/.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误信息
outputs.description: 处理失败时的错误信息，成功时为空字符串。
outputs.description-en: Error message on failure; empty string on success.

params.name: imageSize
params.label: 图像尺寸
params.description: 输出灰度图的边长（像素，正方形）。
